mapper.select:
SELECT w.id, w.user_id, w.reason, w.del_flag, w.create_by, w.create_time, u.nick_name, d.dept_name FROM pm_daily_report_whitelist w INNER JOIN sys_user u ON w.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON u.dept_id = d.dept_id WHERE w.del_flag = '0'
AND (u.nick_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR d.dept_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY w.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pm_daily_report_whitelist WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND del_flag = '0'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pm_daily_report_whitelist WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pm_daily_report_whitelist (user_id, reason, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{reason}, '0', #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime})
